hook: I spent $89 on a pillow and stopped waking up in pain.

aida_breakdown.attention: Creator wakes up and immediately grabs her neck with a wince — '$89 ENDED MY NECK PAIN' overlaid bold on screen.
aida_breakdown.interest: Creator holds up her old flat yellowed pillow, folds it in half and it stays flat — no spring-back. Admits she'd been waking up stiff for three years.
aida_breakdown.desire: Unboxes Eli & Elm, shows adjustable fill and side-sleeper cutout, cuts to morning scene of creator waking up rolling her neck with zero wince.
aida_breakdown.action: Creator sits on bed holding pillow, smiles at camera, taps bio link.

value_equation.dream_outcome: Wake up with zero neck pain and feel genuinely rested — every single morning.
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Adjustable fill shown on camera, side-sleeper-specific ergonomic cutout demonstrated, three-year personal pain timeline adds real credibility.
value_equation.time_delay: First night — creator reports change the very next morning.
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: One Amazon order, one swap from your old pillow — nothing else changes in your routine.

scenes.visual_prompt: Morning bedroom scene. Creator sits up in bed, immediately reaches to rub her neck and winces. Soft natural morning light. Bold '$89 ENDED MY NECK PAIN' overlaid in white.
scenes.voiceover: I woke up with neck pain every single morning.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator holds up a completely flat and yellowed pillow. She folds it in half — it stays folded with zero spring-back. She looks at it with a disgusted but relatable expression.
scenes.voiceover: I'd had this pillow for three years. Basically cardboard.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator holds the Eli & Elm box with a skeptical raised eyebrow at the camera. Price label visible: $89. She shrugs as if to say 'why not.'
scenes.voiceover: I was skeptical. Eighty-nine dollars for a pillow felt excessive.

scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up of hands unzipping the pillow and pulling out fill to adjust loft. Side-profile shot clearly showing the ergonomic curved cutout designed for side sleepers. Creator nods approvingly.
scenes.voiceover: You control the fill. Built specifically for side sleepers.

scenes.visual_prompt: Morning scene: Creator wakes up, sits up slowly, rolls her neck side to side with a genuinely surprised expression — no wince at all. Bright morning light. She looks at camera and shakes her head in disbelief.
scenes.voiceover: First morning: zero neck pain. I was wrong about this one.

scenes.visual_prompt: Creator sits on bed holding the pillow, relaxed genuine smile, taps phone showing Instagram bio. Clean bright bedroom background.
scenes.voiceover: Everything is linked in my bio.

caption:
I spent $89 on a pillow and my neck pain is gone.

I'd been waking up stiff for three years. Tried different sleeping positions, a mattress topper, everything. My pillow was completely flat and I kept ignoring it because I didn't want to spend money on a pillow.

Got the Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow. Adjustable fill so you set the loft yourself. Ergonomic cutout built for side sleepers. I was skeptical at $89.

First morning I woke up and rolled my neck and nothing hurt. I actually laughed out loud.

Link in bio. Worth every dollar.

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Eli & Elm Side Sleeper Adjustable Pillow
